project.name: Red Ball AI Production
project.summary: Local live dashboard data for PM moderation, active agent state, task progress, conversation snippets, and production artifacts.

statusLegend.thinking: Agent is reasoning or preparing output; show a subtle thinking indicator.
statusLegend.running: Agent is actively producing work or speaking; show as active/live.
statusLegend.done: Agent completed the current task or historical assignment.
statusLegend.blocked: Agent cannot proceed without input, dependency, or QA evidence.
statusLegend.idle: Agent is available but not currently active.

meetingNotes.title: Live dashboard priority
meetingNotes.note: Agent cards must open a selected-agent transcript panel and keep updating through the existing one-second polling loop.

meetingNotes.title: Outbound message gap
meetingNotes.note: No real Codex subagent API is connected; composer messages are stored locally as pending PM dispatch items.

meetingNotes.title: Roster synced after Sprint 01 docs follow-up
meetingNotes.note: Dashboard data now includes James, Arendt, Hume, and Wegener after the Sprint 01 release/docs follow-up push. This remains a manual sync path covered by TD-0007 and TD-0008.

pmDecisionLog.decision: Mastery-first product direction now; Trickline contracts later.
pmDecisionLog.reason: Clear, All Coins, and Clean Run are safer for the MVP than full route contracts/ghosts.

pmDecisionLog.decision: Rewarded heart recovery only, no death-pressure ads.
pmDecisionLog.reason: Physics failure should feel like practice, not scarcity pressure.

pmDecisionLog.decision: Use a CC0-first asset pipeline with manifest tracking.
pmDecisionLog.reason: Keeps import and licensing risk low while production scope is moving.

pmDecisionLog.decision: Repo push must exclude Library, Temp, Logs, Builds, UserSettings, and root .DS_Store files.
pmDecisionLog.reason: Unity generated files and machine-local settings should not enter the first commit.

pmDecisionLog.decision: Live dashboard uses a local HTTP server plus refreshable JSON, not a heavy backend yet.
pmDecisionLog.reason: Meets the browser-visible live cockpit need without introducing external infrastructure.

pmDecisionLog.decision: Dashboard agent statuses are limited to thinking, running, done, blocked, and idle.
pmDecisionLog.reason: Gives the UI a stable visualization contract for active, completed, blocked, and waiting states.

pmDecisionLog.decision: PM must not code the dashboard directly; realtime dashboard engineer owns implementation.
pmDecisionLog.reason: Keeps PM in direction/acceptance and gives the runtime work a clear engineering owner.

pmDecisionLog.decision: Use local HTTP plus one-second JSON polling for the live dashboard.
pmDecisionLog.reason: Meets the no-manual-refresh requirement without a heavy framework or fragile background service.

pmDecisionLog.decision: Dashboard composer stores outbound messages in local browser queue as PM dispatch pending.
pmDecisionLog.reason: There is no real Codex subagent dispatch API available in this local static dashboard runtime.

pmDecisionLog.decision: Agent cards and the selected-agent panel expose Open Codex Chat; the relay opens Codex.app while direct agent chat deep links remain unavailable.
pmDecisionLog.reason: Codex.app declares the codex URL scheme, but no documented or discoverable agent-specific deep-link format was found locally.

pmDecisionLog.decision: Sprint 01 release was pushed to origin/main with primary commit 5d7ee44; docs follow-up push commit 5811a55 is recorded separately.
pmDecisionLog.reason: Release evidence and follow-up documentation need dashboard-visible traceability.

pmDecisionLog.decision: Treat Sprint 01 QA as partial: compile/import and EditMode smoke 6/6 PASS are recorded, but full PlayMode/manual traversal remains required under TD-0006.
pmDecisionLog.reason: EditMode harness reduces regression risk but does not replace runtime traversal evidence.

pmDecisionLog.decision: No ads SDK/import or real ads for Sprint 01; ads remain deferred after TASK-0023.
pmDecisionLog.reason: Protects mastery-first MVP and avoids privacy/config/reward pressure risk before approval gates.

pmDecisionLog.decision: Marketing copy/storyboard alignment follows Sprint 01 scope, with public claims gated on real-play capture QA.
pmDecisionLog.reason: Prevents marketing from promising behavior before QA evidence exists.

pmDecisionLog.decision: Dashboard roster was manually synced after Sprint 01 docs follow-up to include James, Arendt, Hume, and Wegener.
pmDecisionLog.reason: Dashboard JSON is still manually maintained; automation gap remains covered by TD-0007 and handoff/process drift by TD-0008.

pmDecisionLog.decision: TASK-0024 is complete as a manual/mobile QA plan with 25 MQA scenarios and xcodebuild -list PASS.
pmDecisionLog.reason: Manual/mobile execution is still required for final Sprint 01 QA closure, but the plan and workspace readability evidence are dashboard-visible.

pmDecisionLog.decision: Accept TASK-0026 automated PlayMode traversal smoke as 5/5 PASS evidence.
pmDecisionLog.reason: This upgrades QA state beyond EditMode-only evidence while preserving manual/mobile traversal as a remaining gate.

pmDecisionLog.decision: Record iOS Simulator build as BLOCKED / TD-0012 after workspace/list PASS.
pmDecisionLog.reason: The generated Unity Xcode target exposes iphoneos only and has no eligible simulator destination, so simulator compile cannot proceed from the current export.

pmDecisionLog.decision: Use clean Unity Simulator SDK export in Sprint 02 for simulator remediation unless simulator evidence becomes a Sprint 01 release gate.
pmDecisionLog.reason: Clean export keeps generated project ownership clear and avoids fragile Xcode project edits.

pmDecisionLog.decision: Record post-PlayMode/iOS strategy push commit 1238284 as the latest pushed follow-up.
pmDecisionLog.reason: PlayMode smoke and iOS strategy state need release timeline traceability.

pmDecisionLog.decision: Dashboard roster was manually synced after PlayMode/iOS follow-up to include Euclid, Hilbert, McClintock, Locke, and Confucius.
pmDecisionLog.reason: Dashboard JSON is still manually maintained; automation gap remains covered by TD-0007 and handoff/process drift by TD-0008.

decisions: Mastery-first product direction now; Trickline contracts later.
Rewarded heart recovery only, no death-pressure ads.
CC0-first asset pipeline with manifest tracking.
Repo push must exclude Library, Temp, Logs, Builds, UserSettings, and root .DS_Store files.
Live dashboard uses local HTTP server plus JSON refresh, not a heavy backend yet.
Dashboard agent statuses are thinking, running, done, blocked, and idle.
PM gives direction and acceptance only; realtime dashboard engineer owns implementation.
Live dashboard runtime polls local JSON every one second through the local HTTP launcher.
Agent message composer is local queue only until a real Codex subagent dispatch API exists.
Agent chat handoff opens Codex.app because no direct agent chat deep-link format is available.
Sprint 01 release push reached origin/main with primary commit 5d7ee44; docs follow-up push commit 5811a55 is separately recorded.
Sprint 01 QA is partial: compile/import and EditMode smoke 6/6 PASS are recorded, but PlayMode/manual traversal remains pending under TD-0006.
TASK-0023 keeps Sprint 01 ads deferred: no SDK import, no real ads, and no monetization claims until approval gates.
Marketing is aligned to Sprint 01 scope, but public capture and claims remain gated on real-play QA evidence.
Dashboard roster synced after Sprint 01 docs follow-up; manual state sync remains covered by TD-0007 and TD-0008.
TASK-0024 completed with 25 manual/mobile QA scenarios and xcodebuild -list PASS; manual/mobile execution evidence remains pending before Sprint 01 full QA PASS.
PlayMode traversal smoke is accepted as automated runtime evidence for TASK-0026 with 5/5 PASS and XML results committed.
iOS Simulator build remains BLOCKED under TD-0012 despite workspace/list PASS; Sprint 01 stays device-only/open unless simulator evidence becomes a release gate.
